title: Ragdolls
description: Adds lightweight ragdoll physics to minecraft
body:
## **Ragdolls**
Adds lightweight ragdoll physics to **most** humanoid mobs and animals.
This mod is _client-sided only_, so it _should_ work on most servers without needing to be installed on the server

If you wish to add your own ragdolls for mobs using my mod, you can do so by reading this: [Ragdolls API](https://github.com/flarglefingler/Ragdolls-API)

Supported languages: English (US), Spanish, Latin American Spanish, Brazilian Portuguese, French, Russian, Italian, Chinese, Korean, Japanese.

Requires: Fabric API, Cloth Config, Mod Menu (Optional).

All gallery images were taken on public servers.
